# Emails

## Usage
The component cannot be used outside of the Enso ecosystem.

### Installation

Install the package:
```
yarn add @enso-ui/emails
```

## Contributions

are welcome. Pull requests are great, but issues are good too.

Thank you to all the people who already contributed to Enso!
